concern_phrase: Anthropic direct access is the right
notes: Fail diff hardcodes Anthropic as the only fallback (raises KeyError on missing env var — crashes for OAuth-only users), with an explicit 'single biggest onboarding cliff' comment that reinforces the inflated-problem framing. Pass diff checks for the key first, surfaces a clear error when absent, and phrases the error to suggest that other direct-provider fallbacks would be supported.
